package rulecoverage

func NegativeFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerb() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_errorf_without_wrap_verb"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Errorf(\"context: %v\", err)` instead of `%w`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
